function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap and finance lane exactness rules; used invoice records directly.
function.outcome_justification: The target line item appears in three invoices; only records issued on/after 2026-02-01 qualify. Excluded 2026-01-19 (line_eur 110). Included 2026-02-17 (line_eur 220) and 2026-04-27 (line_eur 160). Total = 380.
